data.title: Onboarding-generated dso shim routes 'ticket' to ticket-cli.sh instead of ticket dispatcher
data.description: The dso shim template generated during onboarding routes ticket commands via: exec /opt/homebrew/bin/bash "$SCRIPTS_DIR/ticket-cli.sh" "$@". It should route to the v3 ticket dispatcher: exec /opt/homebrew/bin/bash "$SCRIPTS_DIR/ticket" "$@". This causes all ticket subcommands to fail after onboarding.
